data_description.grid_sensor_entity_id: Sensor reporting grid power in Watts (negative = surplus fed to grid, e.g. Shelly 3EM channel_power)
data_description.hysteresis_w: Buffer in Watts to avoid switching at the threshold
data_description.rolling_samples: Number of readings to average — higher = more stable but slower response
data_description.min_on_time_s: Minimum seconds a miner must stay ON before being turned off
data_description.min_off_time_s: Minimum seconds a miner must stay OFF before being turned on
data_description.simulation_enabled: Creates a switch and a slider (0–10000 W) to simulate PV surplus. When simulation is active, real sensor readings are ignored.

select_miners.title: Select Miners
select_miners.description: Found {count} miners via hass-miner. Select which ones should be controlled.

data_description.power_w: Rated power draw of this miner — determines how much surplus is needed to switch it on
data_description.priority: Miners with lower priority numbers are switched on first and off last

abort.no_miners_found: No miners found via hass-miner. Please set up miners via the hass-miner integration first.
abort.no_miners_selected: At least one miner must be selected

error.no_miners_selected: Please select at least one miner
Please select at least one miner
